content:
# LUT Generation Design: Bootstrap References from Footage (2026-04-01)
## Decision
Generate reference images from existing D-Log M keyframes using generate_references.py rather than downloading external images or using synthetic gradients.
## Rationale
Uses real DJI Action 4 footage (realistic color distribution), reproducible (no external dependencies), color science grounded (D-Log M decode, white balance, contrast, highlight rolloff, saturation, sRGB encode).
## Parameters (look_v1)
red_gain=2.0, green_gain=1.0, blue_gain=0.75, gamma=0.55, saturation=1.3, shadow_lift=0.005
## Known limitation
Reference-based gain derivation has circular reasoning — derives gains from already-corrected images, reinforcing blue bias. v2 should compute correction from raw-to-target delta. Follow-up: issue #14.
